title: CapabilityClassification
description: L1 (derived) — Classifies one raw extracted BusinessCapability against the curated ReferenceCapability spine: either PLACED under a reference node at an assigned tree level (2 capability / 3 function / 4 activity), or REJECTED with a reason (generic mention, control, policy, duplicate, not-a-capability). The materialised, correctable judgment of the classification pass (ADR-0009, triggers #1+#2); the Business-Architecture Lens projects the tree over the spine + these. Reuses base-entry `confidence` for the classifier's certainty. Placement/rejection field conventions (assignedParent+assignedLevel when placed; rejectionReason when rejected) are enforced by the pass and projector, not the schema, so the first cut stays additive and simple.

subject.description: Id of the raw BusinessCapability being classified — its evidence and the node this classification is about.

disposition.description: placed = belongs in the EA tree under assignedParent; rejected = not a genuine capability (see rejectionReason).

assignedParent.description: ReferenceCapability (name or id) under which the subject is placed. Present when disposition = placed.

assignedLevel.description: Level in the EA tree when placed: 2 = matches a curated capability, 3 = function, 4 = activity.

rejectionReason.description: Why the subject is not a placed capability. Present when disposition = rejected.

rationale.description: The classifier's justification for the disposition — always present.
